message:
🌱 Replace nil slice declarations with make([]T, 0) in nvidia and workloads (#10928)

Initialize slices with make([]T, 0) instead of var declarations so
JSON serialization produces [] instead of null. Per CLAUDE.md convention.

- pkg/agent/server_nvidia.go: results := make([]nvidiaOperatorStatus, 0)
  and remove redundant nil guard
- pkg/api/handlers/mcp_workloads.go: workloads := make([]v1alpha1.Workload, 0)
  and simplify conditional assignment

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
